channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
item.description: More than four in every 10 deaths and disappearances occurred on sea routes to Europe, UN agency says.

item.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
item.description: The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry.

item.title: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
item.description: The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

item.title: Trump announces Iran ceasefire extension but says blockade remains
item.description: US president says attacks will be held off until Iranian leaders 'come up with a unified proposal' to end war.

item.title: Two CIA agents reportedly killed in car crash in Mexican state of Chihuahua
item.description: The presence of US officials in a law enforcement convoy raises questions about respect for Mexico's sovereignty.

item.title: Nicaragua’s president says Trump ‘mentally deranged’ over war on Iran
item.description: Nicaraguan President has criticised his US counterpart Donald Trump, over the war on Iran.

item.title: US forces detain Iran-linked tanker Tifani with ceasefire talks on edge
item.description: Ship, detained under US policy to stop all Tehran-linked vessels, is under sanctions for smuggling Iranian crude.

item.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
item.description: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.

item.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
item.description: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.

item.title: Role of US officials killed in crash in Mexico under scrutiny
item.description: Two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
